2026-04-08T19:34:30.0717786Z You are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental
2026-04-08T19:34:30.0718631Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-08T19:34:30.0719640Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-08T19:34:30.0720133Z 
2026-04-08T19:34:30.0720458Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-08T19:34:30.0721240Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T19:34:30.0721677Z 
2026-04-08T19:34:30.0721871Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T19:34:30.0722179Z 
2026-04-08T19:34:30.0722368Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-04-08T19:34:30.0722651Z 
2026-04-08T19:34:30.0722810Z   git switch -
2026-04-08T19:34:30.0723029Z
